feedback.text: Hello! Just want to drop in my 2 cents here! Personally, i would love to own the games i buy, like any physical copy of any product, be it CD-album or a movie, and for consumer rights to be protected by the law. Even not being an EU citizen, i believe that the benefits of Digital Fairness Act can be helpfull around the globe in a long-term. So, to whom it may concern, please take this into consideration. Thank you very much for your time!
